Notice And Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery And For Sanctions; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF PHOENIX ELECTRIC COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery And For Sanctions is granted. The Requests for Admission at issue will be deemed admitted unless Defendant serves responses before the commencement of the hearing. Defendant to respond to the other written discovery at issue without objections by March 16, 2012. Court awards sanctions against Defendant in the amount of $1,244.00. Prevailing party to prepare order. Protem Judge: David Mcdonald, Not reported. =302/HK
